summary: Full e2e testing of Dr. Nicola Medda landing page completed. Backend (6/6 pytest) and frontend (all flows) pass. Italian text content verified, all 14 patologie present, navigation works, contact form validates consent and submits successfully with toast feedback.

issues: Date input uses native browser picker (mm/dd/yyyy format). For an Italian-only site, dd/mm/yyyy locale or a shadcn calendar component would be more consistent with the audience. Not blocking.

action_items: Optional: replace native HTML date input with shadcn Calendar / DatePicker for IT locale consistency.
Optional: lock CORS_ORIGINS to the production frontend URL instead of '*' before going live.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True; combination is rejected by browsers when credentials are sent. Currently no credentialed requests are made, but tighten before adding auth.
Contact.jsx: axios POST has no timeout — acceptable for a small form but consider 10s timeout for resilience.
Patologie listed in select (15 entries with 'Altro / Da definire') vs Patologie.jsx cards (14) is intentional and aligned with the spec.
All files are small and well-scoped; no DRY violations; data-testid coverage on critical interactive elements is complete.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest created several TEST_ prefixed appointments via POST /api/appointments. Playwright also submitted one appointment with email playwright_test@example.com. These records persist in the appointments collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend exposes only POST/GET /api/appointments (plus /api/status, /api/). Frontend is a single-page Italian landing built from components in /app/frontend/src/components/landing. All data-testids documented in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/home.js. Toasts use sonner library — they render under [data-sonner-toast] and disappear after ~5s.
verified_flows: Page loads at root '/' with all 8 sections (Navbar, Hero, ChiE, Metodo, Patologie, Struttura, Gallery, Contact, Footer)
Hero shows 'Dr. Nicola Medda', subtitle 'chirurgia mini-invasiva del piede e della caviglia', stats '30+', '10.000+', 'Invasiva percutanea'
ChiE shows all 4 aree di competenza and 'oltre 10.000 interventi eseguiti'
All 5 nav links (chi, metodo, patologie, struttura, prenota) render with correct testids
Hero CTAs scroll to #prenota and #patologie sections
Contact form rejects submit without consenso (toast error)
Contact form submits valid payload to POST /api/appointments, displays success toast, resets form
POST /api/appointments validates consenso (400), email format (422), required fields (422)
GET /api/appointments returns persisted records without _id field
